# Apr 01 2002 at 2:30 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592252265566
86 posts
i have found this to b one of the 2 highest cha items in game correct? (as for waist items)

jumped on it when it went up for sale in EC talked him down from 10k to 9k hope i didnt get hosed i checked here b4 i got it and many ppl saying they would pay much more so i figured what the heck thanks all who post on these things and to alakz.

Zaphod 57 ench nameless

Edited, Mon Apr 1 02:27:04 2002
▲ Page top
Multiple classes
QuoteReply
# Oct 26 2001 at 1:46 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592247278142
Scholar
101 posts
There are many classes who could use this? why do people always try to classify - if it was ment to be an Enchanter/druid only item, it would be enchanter/druid only :)

Its a good piece for Anyone who can use either stat - so, Pally, Cleric, Druid, Shaman, Beastlord? (wis) - Ench, Bard, Shaman?, Beastlord? (Chrisma). Then again, a warrior who wants to get better prices when he sells might want it as well... :P

Personally, i have +5 wis belt, so the +5 extra from this would be very useful.. i could use the resists as well.. Point is - its good for alot of people.

Garon - 53 Cleric

Edited, Fri Jan 4 17:13:49 2002

# Nov 14 2002 at 12:27 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1663546654093

As far as everything I have read and noticed while playing, Charisma does help with resists and duration of the Root line of spells. If you have any evidence contrary to this, I would like to see it.
